subchecks.command: SUCCESS_PATH=/tmp/shaula/task11-interactive-success.png; rm -f "${SUCCESS_PATH}"; OUT=$(SHAULA_CAPTURE_FORCE_NONINTERACTIVE_SELECTION=0 SHAULA_OVERLAY_HELPER_STDIO_TEST_MODE=interaction_drag SHAULA_COMPOSITOR=niri NIRI_SOCKET=/tmp/niri.sock WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-1 ./zig-out/bin/shaula capture area --json --output "${SUCCESS_PATH}"); printf '%s\n' "${OUT}" | jq -e --arg path "${SUCCESS_PATH}" '.ok==true and .mode=="area" and .path==$path and .dimensions.width>0 and .dimensions.height>0' >/dev/null && [[ -f "${SUCCESS_PATH}" ]]

set +e; OUT=$(SHAULA_CAPTURE_FORCE_NONINTERACTIVE_SELECTION=0 SHAULA_OVERLAY_HELPER_STDIO_TEST_MODE=interaction_cancel SHAULA_COMPOSITOR=niri NIRI_SOCKET=/tmp/niri.sock WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-1 ./zig-out/bin/shaula capture area --json 2>&1); RC=$?; set -e; [[ ${RC} -ne 0 ]] && printf '%s\n' "${OUT}" | jq -e '.ok==false and .error.code=="ERR_SELECTION_CANCELLED"' >/dev/null

set +e; OUT=$(SHAULA_CAPTURE_FORCE_NONINTERACTIVE_SELECTION=0 SHAULA_OVERLAY_HELPER_STDIO_TEST_MODE=malformed SHAULA_COMPOSITOR=niri NIRI_SOCKET=/tmp/niri.sock WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-1 ./zig-out/bin/shaula capture area --json 2>&1); RC=$?; set -e; [[ ${RC} -ne 0 ]] && printf '%s\n' "${OUT}" | jq -e '.ok==false and .error.code=="ERR_OVERLAY_PROTOCOL_INVALID"' >/dev/null

FALLBACK_PATH=/tmp/shaula/task11-interactive-fallback.png; rm -f "${FALLBACK_PATH}" "/tmp/shaula/task11-slurp-called.log"; OUT=$(PATH="/tmp/shaula/task11-slurp-bin:${PATH}" SLURP_CALL_LOG="/tmp/shaula/task11-slurp-called.log" SHAULA_CAPTURE_FORCE_NONINTERACTIVE_SELECTION=0 SHAULA_OVERLAY_HELPER_BIN=/definitely/missing/shaula-overlay SHAULA_COMPOSITOR=niri NIRI_SOCKET=/tmp/niri.sock WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-1 ./zig-out/bin/shaula capture area --json --output "${FALLBACK_PATH}"); printf '%s\n' "${OUT}" | jq -e --arg path "${FALLBACK_PATH}" '.ok==true and .mode=="area" and .path==$path and .dimensions.width>0 and .dimensions.height>0' >/dev/null && [[ -f "${FALLBACK_PATH}" ]] && [[ -f "/tmp/shaula/task11-slurp-called.log" ]]
